On the other hand, I don't have any information about Stacey McClean being a musician or a singer. However, I do know that Stacey McClean is a Canadian politician who has been a member of the Legislative Assembly of Prince Edward Island. While she may have sung in public or in a non-professional capacity, I don't have any evidence to suggest that singing is a significant part of her profession or public persona. Therefore, I can conclude that Jimi Hendrix is a singer, but I don't have enough information to confirm that Stacey McClean is a singer. </think>
<answer> No </answer>
